channel.title: Backend on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Backend on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer

item.title: Big Data Engineering: Optimizing PySpark Pipelines at 6sense
item.description: Owned critical big data infrastructure handling millions of signals daily. Optimized a core PySpark DAG saving 45 mins/day and retired legacy systems to save $130K annually.
